completed_tasks.name: Add burst-confirmation tests and bounded fast-clamp behavior
Expose bounded burst telemetry in health and metrics with tests
Deploy and validate tcp_12down improvement against RRUL

decisions.decision: Manual gate result recorded as approved: improved and safe
decisions.rationale: Final retune reduced tcp_12down p99 to 134ms and 74ms, kept rrul_be at 144ms p99, and produced no RRUL false trigger.

next_action: Run $gsd-complete-milestone or commit the Phase 166 implementation batch.
context_notes: Spectrum production metrics remain enabled on 10.10.110.223:9100 for burst validation. Final acceptance is based on the last live gate; the final passing sample did not increment the burst counter.
